channel.title: eventlog on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in eventlog on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: Export Remote Eventlog with PowerShell
item.description: Event logs are a cornerstone of troubleshooting, but getting access to them can be difficult across the network. It can be faster to export a Windows event log on a remote computer, copy the .evtx file over the network and then query it locally. The built-in PowerShell Get-Winevent cmdlet can work against remote event logs, but it can be painfully slow to stream events when network bandwidth is limited.
